title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Tata Elxsi

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Tata Elxsi
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Elxsi:
Tata Elxsi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi!
